name: Impossible Tuna Pie
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1-1/2 inches.
Layer the tuna, celery, cheese, and onions in the plate.
In a blender, beat the remaining ingredients for 15 seconds.
Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
Bake until golden brown or a knife inserted in the center comes out clean (approximately 40 minutes).
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving. Serve with lemon wedges if desired.
